fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $463.32M TTM — positive cash generation.
Forward P/E 41.84x and PEG 1.67x — reflects high growth expectations.
Consensus buy rating from 36 analysts with a mean target of $362.24.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and Operating margin 0.0% — currently loss-making.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% YoY — recent earnings have slowed.

news.paragraph: MongoDB (MDB) is seeing continued analyst optimism, with multiple firms maintaining buy ratings and raising price targets following its recent strong earnings report. The company's valuation is supported by AI momentum and a significant one-year rally, though its growth metrics show some deceleration. The upcoming earnings report will be key to watch for continued momentum.
